description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a matte olive and black finish, a collapsible stock, and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The upper receiver is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail, allowing for the attachment of various optics or accessories. The handguard is ribbed for improved grip and heat dissipation, and the barrel is of standard length with a simple front sight post. A detachable curved box magazine is inserted, typical for semi-automatic or automatic rifles. The overall construction appears robust, primarily composed of metal and polymer components. The rifle's design suggests it is suitable for both urban tactical operations and civilian sporting use.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, pistol grip, ribbed handguard, and detachable curved magazine, finished in olive and black.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, collapsible stock, pistol grip, ribbed handguard, and curved magazine.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel, front sight post, and narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ejection port, magazine, and overall length of the rifle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock, pistol grip, and alignment of the upper receiver.
